info.english_meaning: to adhere to to become united to come in contact to approachto touch

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'vilagnamaDyA suSroRiH suBrUH sarvaguRAnvitA' (BA0 Adi0 1696) vilagnamaDyA SAtodarI kfSamaDyA saMlInakukziH

'antareRApi vimupasargaM kevalo lagnaSabdaH kfSArTako dfzwaH--taM (mahAvIraM) prAdeSamAtra pfTubuGnaM maDye lagnaM karoti' (bO0 SrO0 93) ityatra yaTA raTakAraSarIre pAdo vilagnaH (paYcata0) saMlagnaH samAsaktaH
'tayA saha tvadarTe kalahAyato mameyatI velA vilagnA' (paYcata0) vilagnA=vyatItA atrArTe'nyatra viralaH prayogaH
'iti DruvaM vyalagizurAttaBItayaH KamuccakarEnalasaKasya ketavaH' (SiSu0 1755) KaM vyalagizu rviyadArUQAH ketavo reRavaH
